PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?birthName WHERE {
  ?season wdt:P154 "3" ; wdt:P179 wd:Q7279101 .

  ?contestant wdt:P69 ?birthName .
}
ORDER BY ?order
LIMIT 1
OFFSET 1
